query: I need a portfolio site for my design agency. We do mostly branding work for fintech startups. Can you build something in Framer that feels premium? Dark mode, minimal, think Linear meets Pentagram.
build me a landing page for my new saas product called TaskHive — it's a project management tool for remote teams. I want hero, features, pricing, testimonials. Dark and techy.
I have Framer open right now with a blank project. Can you help me design a personal blog layout? I want it editorial, lots of whitespace, serif fonts.
forge me a website for a coffee roastery. earthy tones, warm, inviting. needs an online shop section and an about page with the team photos.
can you create a DDD for a developer documentation site? i need specific hex codes, font choices, spacing values. the audience is backend engineers.
make this look good in framer — right now it's just a bunch of unstyled frames. I need a proper nav bar, hero section, and footer. dark mode.
I want to redesign my startup's landing page. Currently it looks super generic — purple gradients, Inter font, stock photos. Help me make it actually distinctive.
set up a new framer project and build out a 3-page marketing site for an AI writing tool. home, pricing, about. modern dark aesthetic.
design a website that converts. I'm launching a waitlist for a new fitness app targeting busy professionals. Need a single-page site with email capture.
help me build a portfolio in framer for my UX case studies. I have 6 projects to showcase. Should feel like a high-end design studio site.
can you help me write a React component that renders a card grid? I'm using Tailwind CSS and Next.js 14 with the app router.
I need to set up a CI/CD pipeline for my project using GitHub Actions. It should run tests, build, and deploy to Vercel on push to main.
debug this Python script — it's throwing a KeyError when I try to access the 'users' field in the API response. Here's the traceback...
review my PR on github — it adds authentication to the /api/users endpoint using JWT tokens. Check for security issues.
write unit tests for the UserService class in src/services/user.ts. It has methods for create, update, delete, and findByEmail.
I'm getting CORS errors when my React frontend at localhost:3000 tries to fetch from my Express API at localhost:4000. How do I fix this?
can you explain how the useEffect cleanup function works in React? I keep getting memory leak warnings.
refactor this 200-line function into smaller pieces. It handles user registration, sends a welcome email, creates a stripe customer, and sets up default preferences.
I need to migrate my database from PostgreSQL to MySQL. Can you generate the migration scripts for these 12 tables?
help me pick colors for my terminal theme — i use iTerm2 with tmux and want something easy on the eyes for long coding sessions.
